task: Look up the current temperature for zip code 10019.
graderReasoning: The agent searched for zip code 10019 on The Weather Network, selected the matching result 'Manhattan, New York,' and reached the current weather page at https://www.theweathernetwork.com/en/city/us/new-york/manhattan/current. The page visibly showed 'Manhattan, NY Updated 6 minutes ago 18°C Partly cloudy,' and the FAQ section also confirmed 'What is the current temperature in Manhattan? 18°'. The final answer of 18°C (about 64°F) is supported by the page evidence.
final_result_response: For zip code 10019, The Weather Network shows the current temperature in Manhattan, NY as **18°C**, about **64°F**.
action_history: Opening The Weather Network: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.theweathernetwork.com/');
Searching for zip code: await page.locator('e11').fill('10019');
Opening Manhattan weather result: await page.locator('e155').click();
